text: Embedding-version skew between ingestion and recall indexes causes semantically relevant memories to score below cutoff, returning zero hits on autoRecallForDispatch (architect, data_correctness).
Recall query adds an implicit project_id predicate from stale session cache, excluding the correct project shard even though matching memories exist (data_correctness, maintainability).
Vector compaction job races with dispatch recall and temporarily removes fresh segments from the active ANN graph, producing 0-hit recalls for active topics (performance, architect).
Case-sensitive normalization on concept filters mismatches stored lowercase tags, so eligible memories are filtered out before similarity ranking (data_correctness, simplicity).
Recall path computes freshness cutoff in local time while t2 rows are UTC; boundary memories are incorrectly marked stale and omitted (data_correctness, architect).
Post-migration fallback keeps querying legacy t1-only table when t2 index build status is unknown, hiding valid t2 memories from auto-recall (maintainability, architect).
Recall adapter silently drops non-ASCII tokens during query sanitization, breaking matches for identifiers and names containing accents (data_correctness, maintainability).
Dedup prefilter hashes only summary text and collapses distinct memories with different remediation details, then all survivors fall below topK after collapse (architect, data_correctness).
Read-replica lag on recall queries returns a snapshot before latest memory writes, so dispatch sees zero relevant hits right after observation ingest (performance, data_correctness).
Recall limit is hardcoded to top 3 in one route while scorer expects top 10; strict thresholding on tiny candidate set yields empty final recalls (simplicity, maintainability).
Project alias resolver maps renamed project keys only on write path; recall path still queries old slug and misses all new observations (maintainability, data_correctness).
Memory recall SQL adds `obs_type IN (...)` from an outdated allowlist that excludes promoted t2 types, resulting in no hits despite relevant long-lived memories (architect, maintainability).
ANN index rebuild leaves orphaned namespace metadata for one shard, and recall queries route to an empty namespace for that project (data_correctness, performance).
Staleness comparator treats malformed timestamps as epoch 0 instead of rejecting row, causing broad false-stale filtering in recall candidates (data_correctness, security).
Recall pipeline applies denylist after semantic scoring; if all topK are denied, it does not backfill from lower-ranked hits and returns empty context (architect, maintainability).
AutoRecallForDispatch returns relevant memories, but context builder truncates the recall section at first markdown fence and drops the retrieved guidance (data_correctness, maintainability).
Prompt composer injects recalled items under an optional block disabled in headless mode, so agents never see returned memories during worker dispatch (architect, maintainability).
Recalled memories are present but sorted oldest-first after hydration, burying critical recent guidance beyond model attention budget (performance, data_correctness).
Context formatter strips parenthetical metadata tags globally, accidentally removing the rationale text from recalled findings before dispatch (simplicity, maintainability).
A fallback summarizer rewrites recalled evidence into generic bullets and discards actionable constraints, so the agent proceeds as if memory were absent (architect, data_correctness).
Recall payload is delivered, but dispatcher serializes only `text` and omits `reason`/`severity`, removing the decision signal needed to honor prior findings (maintainability, data_correctness).
Guardrail logic treats recalled memories as low-priority attachments and prunes them when token pressure rises, while less relevant boilerplate is retained (architect, performance).
UI preview shows recalled context, but worker dispatch path uses a separate template without recall injection, creating a false sense of coverage (maintainability, data_correctness).
Hydration returns recalled rows, yet post-hydration dedup keys on normalized title and removes the only memory containing the relevant mitigation step (data_correctness, architect).
Recall is injected into a hidden system segment that one adapter drops during protocol conversion, so downstream model input excludes retrieved memories (architect, maintainability).
Conflict resolver marks recalled and live instructions as incompatible and always prefers live defaults, effectively overriding long-term memory guidance (data_correctness, simplicity).
Agent handoff payload includes `recall_count > 0`, but recalled body is lost during JSON schema narrowing in transport, so worker executes without the retrieved content (architect, data_correctness).
Recalled memories survive dispatch assembly, but response planner ignores the recall section unless a manual flag is present, bypassing relevant context in auto mode (maintainability, architect).
Trace logs confirm recall rows were fetched, but sanitizer redacts key nouns and turns findings into vague placeholders unusable by the model (security, data_correctness).
Merged recall+instruction prompt places memory block after a hard stop delimiter consumed by adapter, causing the model to ignore all retrieved memories (architect, maintainability).
Write path skips observation persistence when classification score is below an undocumented threshold, even for high-severity findings that should register as memory (architect, data_correctness).
Transaction commits handoff metadata before memory.observe insert; rollback on memory write error leaves no long-lived record for future recall (maintainability, data_correctness).
Schema mapper treats empty `reason` as invalid and aborts memory write entirely, discarding findings that still contain actionable text (simplicity, maintainability).
Memory registration is gated behind `isInteractiveSession`; auto chains bypass the gate and never persist observations for later dispatch recall (architect, maintainability).
Bulk ingest worker acknowledges receipt before enqueueing write job; queue backpressure drops jobs silently, so expected memories are never written (performance, data_correctness).
Observation-to-memory promotion cron excludes sessions with custom project tags due to strict enum parse, preventing registration of relevant findings (maintainability, data_correctness).
Dedup gate runs before persistence and rejects new findings sharing checksum with unrelated historical text, causing missed registration of novel failures (architect, data_correctness).
Memory write function returns success on partial field validation failure, but row insert is skipped and no retry is scheduled (maintainability, simplicity).
Shard router sends writes for certain project slugs to a non-existent partition, logging warnings but dropping memory registrations at runtime (architect, data_correctness).
Write-path feature flag defaults off in worker environment; observations are processed but memory registration branch never executes (maintainability, devils_advocate).
Memory.observe adapter drops findings when `severity` is null-mapped from upstream enums, instead of coercing to Unknown and persisting (data_correctness, simplicity).
Retry handler replays failed writes only for network errors; serialization failures are terminal and leave missing memories without dead-letter tracking (architect, maintainability).
Conditional write skips memory creation when agent role is reviewer, even though reviewer findings are intended as long-lived guidance (architect, data_correctness).
Ingest pipeline parses `findingId` as optional and discards rows with transient parse failures instead of retrying, producing silent registration gaps (maintainability, performance).
Memory registration requires provenance fields not populated by one adapter path, so those findings never persist despite successful upstream review completion (architect, maintainability).
